description: Style Notemumbai slang sets cosmo street trends with this kurti. Those interested in colour blocking can wear this with bright contrasting leggings or pants. Others who want to keep their look classic and chic can pair this with tonal leggings, and embellished slippers.Product DetailsRed woven kurti, has a mandarin collar with a split neckline, embroidery on the front, three fourth sleeves with lace on the cuffs and embroidery on the hemMaterial and CareBlended cottonWash dark colours separatelyDo not bleachWarm ironSize and FitRegular FitThe model (height 5'8" and chest 32") is wearing a size M
